description: Calibration offsets for 101weiqi difficulty levels. Chinese kyu ratings are inflated ~10 stones relative to international standards (e.g., 101weiqi 15K performs like international 25K). Dan ratings do not need offset.

calibration.reasoning: 101weiqi uses a Chinese rating system where kyu ranks are approximately 10 stones weaker than their international equivalents. A puzzle labeled 15K+ on 101weiqi contains beginner-level captures, not intermediate content. Dan ratings roughly align between systems.
